meaning: adj.无隐讳交谈的,爱说话的,畅谈的
examples: I don't find him very communicative.
She has become a lot more tolerant and communicative.
We have a very communicative approach to teaching languages.
This creates a more open and communicative atmosphere, and consequently a more creative and productive workplace.
She is open and communicative with her two daughters about their own mental health, too.
